title: rosa scabrata var. subrotunda
intro: Rosa scabrata var. subrotunda, also known as the rough-leaved rose or rough petal rose, is a type of shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Rosa scabrata var. subrotunda include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antimicrobial protection. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
